commands: lp creategroup default
lp group default meta setprefix 100 "&7[Player] &f"
lp group default meta setsuffix 100 ""
lp group default permission set authme.login true
lp group default permission set authme.register true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd.join true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd.leave true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd.stats true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd.list true
lp group default permission set bw.cmd.autojoin true
lp group default meta setweight 1
lp creategroup vip
lp group vip meta setprefix 200 "&a[VIP] &f"
lp group vip parent add default
lp group vip permission set bw.vip true
lp group vip meta setweight 10
lp creategroup mvp
lp group mvp meta setprefix 300 "&b[MVP] &f"
lp group mvp parent add vip
lp group mvp permission set bw.mvp true
lp group mvp meta setweight 20
lp creategroup admin
lp group admin meta setprefix 900 "&c[ADMIN] &f"
lp group admin parent add mvp
lp group admin permission set * true
lp group admin permission set bw.admin true
lp group admin permission set bw.cmd.admin true
lp group admin permission set bw.setup true
lp group admin permission set bw.vip true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin.register true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin.unregister true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin.changepassword true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin.accounts true
lp group admin permission set authme.admin.reload true
lp group admin permission set minecraft.command.kick true
lp group admin permission set minecraft.command.ban true
lp group admin permission set minecraft.command.gamemode true
lp group admin permission set minecraft.command.tp true
lp group admin permission set minecraft.command.give true
lp group admin meta setweight 50
lp creategroup owner
lp group owner meta setprefix 1000 "&4[OWNER] &c"
lp group owner parent add admin
lp group owner permission set * true
lp group owner permission set luckperms.* true
lp group owner permission set minecraft.command.* true
lp group owner permission set bukkit.command.* true
lp group owner permission set authme.admin.* true
lp group owner permission set bw.* true
lp group owner meta setweight 100
lp user HassanLegend parent set owner
